rawIntent: [gestalt-maintenance/CONTEXT_ALIGNMENT] Reconcile docs/DOMAIN.md and docs/ARCHITECTURE.md: entity 'entities' exists in the domain model but no module references it. Decide whether to introduce the module under src/modules/entities/ or to remove the entity from the domain model.

successCriteria.description: The entity 'entities' is either introduced as a module under src/modules/entities/ or removed from the domain model, and the documentation in docs/DOMAIN.md and docs/ARCHITECTURE.md is updated accordingly.

constraints: Every state-changing operation produces an audit record
RBAC enforced at middleware, never inline
Input validated at the API boundary
outOfScope: Changes to any other modules or entities not related to 'entities'

ambiguities.description: Whether to introduce the module under src/modules/entities/ or to remove the entity from the domain model.
